summary: Successfully integrated HTML template with newsletter content. All template variables replaced with actual content from newsletter_content.md. Final HTML file created with proper Gmail-compatible formatting, purple FOHE branding, mobile responsiveness, and all event details including correct RSVP link for Feb 26 Happy Hour.
learnings: Successfully mapped all content sections from Markdown to HTML template variables
Maintained email client compatibility with inline styles and table-based layout
Verified critical CTA link (https://luma.com/wzol16m6) is correctly integrated
Added subject line options and preheader text in HTML comments for easy access
Template structure allows for easy reuse in Q2 by replacing content variables
